text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That was a good experience. I was able to throw
myself into training much more than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Kobe Shimbun Hai, and after that, the
Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Slowly, but surely, my time in the winner's circle
approaches.
